summary: Iteration 132 — '📋 Copy breakdown' button on the EPOS TradeCustomerChip credit-back panel — fully verified end-to-end. Frontend Playwright on /admin/invoice covered all 7 acceptance criteria plus 2 regressions: (1) after 'Show breakdown' toggle is clicked, a new button [data-testid=epos-credit-breakdown-copy] renders bottom-right of the breakdown panel with label 'Copy breakdown' + ClipboardCopy icon; (2) clicking it writes the expected monospace-aligned plain-text table to the OS clipboard (verified via navigator.clipboard.readText after granting clipboard permissions) — clipboard string matches the spec template including 'Credit-back breakdown — Acme Tiles Ltd (T-AED9E)' header, separator line (─ repeated), one line per product with 28-char name padding + '8% × £50.00' rate×net column + '£4.00' credit column, second separator, and 'Total credit £5.00' footer; (3) button label flips 'Copy breakdown' → 'Copied' (Check icon) after click and reverts back after ~2.2s; (4) toast.success 'Breakdown copied — ready to paste' appears (visible in [data-sonner-toast] dom); (5) button only renders when breakdown panel is open — count drops to 0 after toggling panel closed; (6) all data-testid selectors present (epos-credit-breakdown-copy, row-0, row-1, total); (7) regression: aria-expanded flips true↔false on toggle; (8) regression: trade tier badge testids still 0 in DOM; (9) regression: backend POST /api/invoices/credit-back-rates breakdown payload still returns total_credit=£5.00, blended_rate=5.0%, 2 breakdown rows (premium £4 + generic £1) — iteration_131 pytest re-run PASSED.

issues: Pre-existing 'Encountered two children with the same key, 2026-3' React warning (flagged in iterations 127/129/130/131) — unrelated to this feature

critical_code_review_comments: handleCopyBreakdown correctly uses async clipboard API with a document.execCommand('copy') fallback via a hidden textarea — covers HTTPS secure contexts + older browsers.
Clipboard text generation uses padEnd with nameCol=28, calcCol=18 — matches the spec exactly. Long product names are truncated with ellipsis at nameCol-1 to preserve alignment.

Row name in clipboard falls back to `row.product_name || row.sku || 'Unnamed line'` — correct ordering (product_name first, SKU second). In this test the frontend sent an empty product_name for row 0 so the SKU appears; backend-authoritative payload always supplies product_name when present, so real-world output shows the friendly name.

Copy button is correctly nested INSIDE the `{showBreakdown && Array.isArray(creditBreakdown) && length > 0}` conditional at line 265, so it can never be orphaned when panel is closed. Verified behaviourally (count=0 after collapse).

`setCopied(true)` + `setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 1800)` + `toast.success(..., { duration: 2200 })` — durations match the spec (~1.8s label, ~2.2s toast). No memory leak risk because component unmount during this window would just orphan the timeout (harmless).
toast is from 'sonner' which is already globally wired (<Toaster />) in the app — no new provider setup needed.

Minor: the Total row in the clipboard has 2 spaces after 'Total credit' padded name + 18-char blank spacer + '£5.00' — slightly longer than per-row line total-column alignment because the rate×net column is blank-padded; visually acceptable in monospace fonts and matches the spec's example output.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (13/13 test steps PASS — login, nav, chip render, 2-line invoice, earned pill, toggle open, copy btn render, click, label flip, clipboard content, toast, label revert, panel-close hides button, aria regression, tier badges hidden)

seed_data_creation: Seeded one trade customer (test-bd-84791926 / bd-84791926@example.com / T-AED9E / £200 balance / business_name='Acme Tiles Ltd') + one supplier_products row (BD-SKU-5AADA9 / 8% credit_back_rate). Both removed via cleanup command after testing. No residual test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 132 added a 📋 'Copy breakdown' button inside the EPOS TradeCustomerChip breakdown panel. Selector: [data-testid=epos-credit-breakdown-copy]. Renders ONLY when [data-testid=epos-credit-breakdown-panel] is open. Toggles to '✓ Copied' for 1.8s after click. Writes a plain-text monospace table to navigator.clipboard using padEnd(28) for name col + padEnd(18) for rate×net col. PLAYWRIGHT GOTCHA: must call `context.grant_permissions(['clipboard-read','clipboard-write'])` BEFORE click, then read with `page.evaluate('() => navigator.clipboard.readText()')`. Seed helper at /app/backend/tests/test_epos_credit_breakdown_copy_seed.py (seed|cleanup commands). Sonner toast text for copy success = 'Breakdown copied — ready to paste'. No new backend API in this iteration — data flows via the existing POST /api/invoices/credit-back-rates preview.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature works end-to-end. Copy-to-clipboard correctly writes a monospace-aligned audit table staff can paste into WhatsApp/email/SMS; includes business name + T-ref header, per-line product rate×net=credit, and total footer. Fallback textarea + execCommand('copy') path covers non-HTTPS contexts.
